              Artist Royalty Statement Detail                                                                  A - Fixed Penny Rate
              -------------------------------                                                                  I - Percentage of Receipts
              Source of Sales/Title - The source of the revenue for royalty reporting and/or the               K - At Source Revenue
              title of the product reported.                                                                   N - Published Wholesale Price without Standard Free Goods
                                                                                                               R - Suggested Retail List Price
              Sales Type - This column represents the distribution channel through which the product           S - Invoice Price - Billed Amount/Divided by Total Units Shipped
              was distributed. Various channels include the following:                                         W - Published Wholesale with Standard Free Goods
              *  Retail - Sales to consumers through retail channels, e.g. record stores or mass
                 merchants.                                                                                    Price - The actual price used in the royalty calculation as identified
              *  Direct Mail - Sales made directly to consumers by UMG.                                        by the Price Code.
              *  License - Third party exploitations other than record club or synchronization.
              *  Military - Sales made to armed forces outlets.                                                Pckg Rate - The packaging deduction, if any, used in the royalty calculation.
              *  Premium - Sales of items for distribution in conjunction with another product or
                 service.                                                                                      Royalty Rate - The rate used in the royalty calculation.
              *  Record Club - Record Club license sales.
              *  Stream (Stream-39) - Digital audio transmission that is not loaded on to a local              % Part - The percentage of the product in which the royalty participant
                 storage device for later user (example: Spotify).                                             shares.
              *  Video Stream (Vidstrm-75) - Digital video transmission that is not loaded on to a
                 local storage device for later use (example: Vevo).                                           Effect Rate - The result of the royalty calculation.  The amount paid per unit
              *  Synch - Third party licenses for synchronization with films, videos, or commercials.          reported on the statement.  A negative calculation indicates a deducted rate
              *  TV Adver - Sales supported by television advertising campaigns.                               for a third party.
              *  Perm Download (Permdwl-38) - Digital transmission to a local storage device, which
                 is not subject to time or use limitations (example: iTunes).                                  Units/Receipt -   The number of units on which royalties are calculated.
              *  Mastertone - Clips of the master recording to be downloaded to cell phone which will          Negative numbers in this column represent returned items. If the price code
                 be used as ringers.                                                                           is I, this column contains the receipt amount on which the royalty is calculated.
              Price Level - The three price levels are TOP, MID, and BUDGET.                                   Tax Rate - The tax rate in the applicable territory of sale.
              Sales Date - Refers to the period in which the related sale occurred if made by UMG or           Net Royalty Earnings - Royalties credited to your account. Negative numbers
              was reported if for a third party.                                                               represent returns or amounts credited to third parties such as producers.
              Selection Number - A unique identifier assigned to each product.                                 Balances under $50 will be carried forward to the next statement.
              Config Code - Code that indicates the configuration of the product reported. Most                For a complete listing of config codes and sales types, refer to Frequently

              *  Retail - Sales to consumers through retail channels, e.g. record stores or mass
                 merchants.                                                                                    Price - The actual price used in the royalty calculation as identified
              *  Direct Mail - Sales made directly to consumers by UMG.                                        by the Price Code.
              *  License - Third party exploitations other than record club or synchronization.
              *  Military - Sales made to armed forces outlets.                                                Pckg Rate - The packaging deduction, if any, used in the royalty calculation.

                 service.                                                                                      Royalty Rate - The rate used in the royalty calculation.

              *  TV Adver - Sales supported by television advertising campaigns.                               for a third party.
